hero.title: WSO2 COMMUNITY
hero.subtitle: ROAD SHOW
hero.tagline: APIs and Artificial Intelligence: The New Connection for the Developers of the Future
hero.description: Join the ultimate tour for integration architects and developers in Spain. Get first-hand access to the latest AI use cases, our most advanced Tooling, and connect with the local expert community.

agenda.heroSubtitle: Real and local use cases as the core of the WSO2 tech event.
agenda.heroBody: Real clients from your area will explain how they use WSO2, the decisions they made, and the impact it had on their architectures.

stats.txt: Content you can take back to work

items.title: Local Use Cases
items.description: No theory here — real clients from your area will share their success stories and how WSO2 has transformed their architectures.

items.title: High-Voltage Technical Debate
items.description: Get ready for our interactive and provocative panel where we'll debate the future of architecture: Microservices or APIs?

items.title: Innovation and Security
items.description: We'll dive deep into security and key integration architectures for the Retail, Banking, and Public Sector industries.

items.title: Tooling and Artificial Intelligence
items.description: Discover how WSO2 tools and AI are changing the rules of the game in development.

tourUpdates.credits: Tech atmosphere and WSO2 community photos (Meetup).

items.title: Valencia kick-starts its stop with a focus on APIs, security and community.
items.description: The event at the City of Arts and Sciences will bring together technical teams in integration, architecture and product for a session focused on real cases and local networking.

items.title: Málaga prepares an afternoon dedicated to applied AI on APIs.
items.description: The stop at the National Digital Content Hub will focus on tooling, automation and new ways to build integrations with WSO2.

items.title: Barcelona will host the penultimate stop before the grand finale in Madrid.
items.description: The event at CCIB will arrive at the final stretch of the road show with architecture sessions, tech debate and AI Kombat activation.

kit.description: Come for the networking — we'll take care of the rest. By attending any of our regional events, you'll walk away with an exclusive pack designed for the community:
kit.note: To receive the kit, attendees must register in the WSO2 Spain community.

items.title: The Golden Ticket

cities.description: The Road Show will travel across the country to build the largest tech community.

finale.description: This entire journey will culminate in a massive event in the capital on May 28, 2026, coinciding with the grand closing of the tour in Spain.

aiKombat.sectionSubtitle: by Rafa Granados and Pablo Sagarna
aiKombat.label: EDITORIAL RELEASE
aiKombat.description: The AI Book is an essential guide to understanding how to take artificial intelligence from concept to reality. Through the design of an agentic architecture and the approach of an Agent Manager as the central piece, the book practically explores how to connect and orchestrate LLMs, agents, MCPs, RAGs, APIs and other key components of today's ecosystem. It doesn't just explain technologies separately: it shows how to integrate them to build intelligent, scalable solutions ready for real business environments. A work designed for architects, developers and technology leaders who want to understand the present of AI… and design their next step.
aiKombat.exclusive: This book is not available in stores. It's an exclusive edition for attendees of WSO2 Community Road Show events.

book.title: The AI Book
book.subtitle: Agentic architecture, LLMs, MCPs, RAGs and APIs for intelligent solutions
book.badge: Exclusive edition · Not available in stores
